interstitial.headline: Free Smoke Detector Events in Cincinnati
interstitial.body: First Alert is partnering with CFD for free installation clinics this spring. Protect your family.

result.headline: 24/7 Smoke & Fire Monitoring
result.body: ADT-monitored smoke detectors alert emergency services even when you're not home. Cincinnati homeowners get $0 installation this month.

insight.text: Only 12% of Hamilton County homeowners have reviewed their fire coverage in the past 3 years — yet the average residential fire claim in Ohio exceeds $78,000.

insight.text: Opening Day tickets are averaging $127 on the secondary market — 34% higher than last year, driven by the 150th anniversary ceremony.

result.body: No contracts, no hidden fees. Professional monitoring for $0.50/day. Free shipping to your Cincinnati address.

insight.text: CPF has funded 340 neighborhood security cameras through its community partnership program since 2023 — covering 18 Cincinnati neighborhoods.

interstitial.headline: 5 Minutes From Your New Detour Route
interstitial.body: Right off I-71/75 in Florence. New 2026 models in stock. No bridge needed.

result.headline: Free Shuttle During Bridge Closure
result.body: TANK's free shuttle runs every 30 minutes between Covington and Newport. Save gas, save time, save money.

insight.text: AAA estimates the average NKY commuter will spend an additional $1,847 in fuel and vehicle wear over the closure period — roughly $62/month that wasn't in anyone's budget.

interstitial.headline: DIY Concrete Repair Starts at $12

result.sponsor: Habitat for Humanity of Greater Cincinnati
result.headline: Critical Home Repair Program
result.body: Income-qualifying homeowners can apply for free exterior repairs including walkways and accessibility ramps.

insight.text: The average sidewalk panel replacement in Cincinnati costs $1,800 — but homeowners who use the city's approved contractor list save 15-20% versus independent bids.

interstitial.headline: Gear Up for Sharon Lake
interstitial.body: Kayaks, hiking boots, and birding optics. REI Kenwood — 12 minutes from the park.

result.headline: Support Parks Like Sharon Lake
result.body: Your donation funds trail maintenance, wetland restoration, and free nature programs. Every dollar stays local.

insight.text: Great Parks saw a 23% increase in annual motor vehicle permits sold in 2025 — driven by demand for outdoor recreation that hasn't slowed since the pandemic.

result.body: New Bengals draft jerseys ship within 48 hours of the selection. Pre-order alerts available now.

insight.text: Bengals over/under win total for 2026 is set at 10.5 — the highest since the Burrow era began, reflecting $126M in defensive free agent investment.

result.body: The new home kit is here. Authentic and replica versions available. Free shipping over $50.

insight.text: FC Cincinnati home matches are averaging 25,500 attendance through 5 games — 3rd highest in MLS and 4% above last season's pace.

interstitial.headline: Emergency Kit Essentials In Stock
interstitial.body: Flashlights, weather radios, backup batteries. West Chester and Eastgate locations open 7 days.

result.headline: Does Your Policy Cover Wind Damage?
result.body: Many Ohio homeowners have a separate wind/hail deductible. Your State Farm agent can review your coverage in 10 minutes.

insight.text: The average lead time for tornado warnings in the Cincinnati metro is 13 minutes — but 40% of fatalities occur in mobile homes, where no lead time is enough without a pre-planned shelter location.

interstitial.headline: Flood Insurance Has a 30-Day Waiting Period
interstitial.body: If you're in a flood zone, the time to buy is before the river rises. Get a quote in 5 minutes.

result.headline: Check Your Flood Zone
result.body: FEMA's flood map tool shows your exact risk level. Most flood damage isn't covered by standard homeowner's insurance.

insight.text: The average flood claim in Ohio pays out $52,000 — but fewer than 3% of Hamilton County homeowners outside FEMA zones carry flood insurance, despite increasing flash flood frequency.
